Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc;
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIELLE A. LEE OFFICE OF THE GENERAL COUNSEL, TEL. NO. 538-2517 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Amend Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
